title: Create: Beretium
description:
My first addon for create xd
Adds things like:
- Beretium Alloy
- Robot Plush
- Beretium Greatsword
- Crystalized Mana
and more

Supports Russian and English languages
body:
# **Create: Beretium**

The mod was made using the **MCreator**

**Create: Beretium** - addon for **Create mod**
_This modification adds new items:_
- New Alloy - Beretium
- Crystalized Mana
- New mob from The End - Spark Observer
- New sword with special ability
- Robot Plush
